prevalence.trend: stable; associated with smoking and GERD

burden.dalyPerCapita: low mortality; significant QOL and sleep impact

epidemiology.diagnosticCriteria: Cough >8 weeks; evaluate common causes (asthma, GERD, UACS) and exclude red flags

regionalSpecificities.diagnosisCriteria: Primary care evaluation; chest imaging and spirometry as needed
regionalSpecificities.treatmentProtocol: Treat underlying cause (asthma, GERD, rhinitis), smoking cessation; cough suppressants short-term
regionalSpecificities.regionalChallenges: Limited access to spirometry and specialist care in some regions
regionalSpecificities.strongPoints: Primary care pathways for asthma/GERD management
